changes.name: vulkan-utility-libraries
changes.notes: PR regressed to upstream version — base had custom pin (possibly security fix)

regressions.name: vulkan-utility-libraries
regressions.notes: PR regressed to upstream version — base had custom pin (possibly security fix)

findings.finding: Added SKColorType.Bgra10101010Xr (25) and RgbF16F16F16x (26) with correct BytesPerPixel=8, BitShift=3, AlphaType mappings. Added fOrigin/fHasOrigin to SKJpegEncoderOptions (EXIF). All additions are ABI-safe.
Bidirectional SKColorType<->SKColorTypeNative mappings added for both new color types. Correct and complete.
ToGlSizedFormat for new color types returns 0 (unsupported in GL). Matches upstream behavior.
Added private protected ctor(bool owns, bool weak) controlling native reference strength. Enables GC-safe native-owned streams. Memory management pattern is correct.

BEHAVIORAL CHANGE: Removed parent/child WeakReference chain and VerifyOriginal(). OnDuplicate/OnFork now create independent MemoryStream copies via ReadStreamFully(). Original stream stays readable after duplication. Simpler, eliminates use-after-dispose risks. Breaking vs m119 but intentional for m132.
SKIPPED (generated file validated in Phase 2). Note: Phase 2 found FAIL — mismatches between regenerated and PR versions.
Removed one build flag line from all 8 platform build.cake files. Build config change consistent with m132 upstream changes.
Major test refactoring (72+/82-) matching new duplicate/fork semantics. Tests verify original remains readable after duplication, multiple duplicates from same parent, and independent copy behavior.
Updated for woff2 behavioral change: m132 may return typeface with empty FamilyName. Tests adapted to check for non-null result with possible empty name.
Updated color type count assertions to include new Bgra10101010Xr and RgbF16F16F16x types.
Comprehensive changelog documenting all API additions, removals, behavioral changes, and struct layout changes. Well documented.
Submodule pointer updated — should point to the mono/skia PR #170 head commit.
